description: Style Note Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to school or college. Product Details Black backpack with a main zippered compartment with a pouch fastened by velcro closure Two asymmetric boot compartments and a small pocket on the front which can accomodate a ball One zippered pocket at the front bottom with a mesh pocket inside to carry water bottle or other essentials Wide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying ease  Nike swoosh logo on the front Fabric haul loop Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)  Material and Care Body - polyester,nylon blend Lining - nylon, polyester blend Hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine wash Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not wring Line dry Do not iron Size Height: 46 cm Width: 36 cm Depth: 15 cm
